title: Bath Bombs Gift Set, 12pcs Handmade Fizzy Bubble Bath Bombs, Vegan & Cruelty Free, Perfect for Bubble and Spa Bath, Birthday Mothers Day Gifts Idea for Her/Him, Wife, Girlfriend
features: 【Bath Bombs Gift Set】12 uniquely designed Bath Bombs, handcrafted bath bombs. Each about 60g, 4.8cm in diameter.They all have Gorgeous Fragrance. These bath bombs are refined from plant extracts, essential oils and minerals, which are good for your skin.

【Natural and Organic Bath Bombs】These Bath Bombs are Cruelty free and Made with safe and gentle ingredients. The 12 scents: Lavender/Melon Ball/ Lemon/ Green Tea/ Mango papaya/ Shea Butter & Coconut/ Rose/ Sweet Orange/ OCEAN/CHAMOMILE/ Mint/ STRAWBERRY . The aromatics in the bath bombs are gathered by Steam distillation and cold pressing techniques without additives or fillers.

【Handmade and Vegan】 These bath bombs are Therapeutic and Moisturizing which will suitable for Normal/Dry skin. They are handmade with natural and organic ingredients such as sea salt, natural essential oil, shea butter. The containing rich essential oils hydrate and keep your skin elasticity.

【The 12 scents】:Baking Soda,Citric Acid,Sea Salt,Corn Starch,Essential Oils,Shea Butter,Cocoa Butter,Vitamin C,Natural Fragrance,Distilled Water. There are 12 different scents to choose from, choose the scent you want then make a fun and bubbly bath time experience for you or your kids.

【Great Gift for You and Your Family Members】 Our bath bomb gift set is a perfect gift choice for people in all ages. Perfect gift ideas for party and wedding. Perfect for Mother's Day and Fathers Day gifts, birthday gift, spa/bath gifts, for the special one, perfect gifts for mom, wife, girlfriend or your teenagers.
description: Product Description Relax and Enjoy Your bath time with Maylawn Bath Bombs! 12 uniquely handmade Fizzy Bubble Bath bombs for relaxation, you will love how you smell after bath. Drop the bath bombs in water, they will float and fizz, giving water a bright color. Soaking in a soothing and silky bath will nourish every inch of skin, help relieve stress and pain, relieve muscle discomfort and detox. It can also help you sleep better and feel more relaxed. Enjoy the comfort of a spa at home What are the benefits of using bath bombs? Minimize your dry skin. Relax your body and mind. Made your skin silky smooth and soften. Cleanses the skin and exfoliates. Great gift for you and your family members: Package is designed to make a perfect gift sets. Bath bombs Individually Wrapped, and the outer layer is wrapped in paper to keep freshness and aroma. Best gift for you and your family members. The 12 scents: - Lavender - Melon Ball - Lemon - Green Tea - Mango papaya - Shea Butter & Coconut - Rose - Sweet Orange - OCEAN - CHAMOMILE - Mint - STRAWBERRY
